title: MassAbility Annual Report FY2024
description: Official MassAbility annual report for Massachusetts state fiscal year 2024 (July 1, 2023 – June 30, 2024) — the first annual report published under the MassAbility name following the agency's rebrand from the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC) in September 2024. Covers the agency's three divisions — Career Services, Home & Community Life, and Disability Determination Services (DDS) — with program activity, funding by program, and narrative highlights. Prose report converted to Markdown.
